data.content: Merged fix/foolery-9407 to main and pushed to origin. Changes: (1) Fixed kno rollback commands to use --status instead of invalid --state in 3 locations in terminal-manager.ts, (2) Changed parent/scene claim failure instruction from skip-and-continue to stop-immediately in knots-backend.ts, (3) Added test coverage for exact rollback command and parent prompt contract. All 83 tests pass, typecheck clean.
